_publications._publicationTitle: Drug Responses in Plexiform Neurofibroma Type I (PNF1) Cell Lines Using High-Throughput Data and Combined Effectiveness and Potency.

_contextSnippet: DREA can be used to assess candidate compounds individually by the cell line...This allows an analysis to reflect the molecular heterogeneity of different cell lines
details: Can be used to assess candidate compounds individually by the cell line, allowing analysis to reflect the molecular heterogeneity of different cell lines
